---
title: "🗓️ Week 10  - Remote Sensing"
---

In this week, we will learn what is remote sensing and what it is used for?


## 👨‍🏫 Lecture Slides 

We'll learn:

- [Introduction to Remote Sensing](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1GUxQS16arawLz3pmZKExkPOW8WtyQPVL/view?usp=sharing)


## **Practical exercises**:


[Download Sentinel-2 data for your municipality](https://rpubs.com/ials2un/1436811)


## 📚 Homework

- [Learn to explore Sentinel-2 imagery](https://livingatlas.arcgis.com/sentinel2explorer).
